programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Watch as air, water, fire, and land collide in a mess of epic proportions!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Heavy machinery, demolitions, roadside wrecks, and construction fails get ready for a full-scale mess!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: When storms brew and the ground crumbles, the mess is as epic as the disasters!

programme.title: FailArmy Trivia
programme.desc: A blockbuster mashup of movie trivia and big-screen-worthy fails.

programme.title: FailArmy Trivia
programme.desc: Pack your bags. We’re going on a fail-cation.

programme.title: FailArmy Now
programme.desc: What do a Superhero, a mountain-biker gang and janky furniture have in common? They're on FAILARMY NOW.

programme.title: FailArmy Now
programme.desc: What do flaming hot peppers, rhythmless dancers and horses have in common? They're on FAILARMY NOW.

programme.title: FailArmy Now
programme.desc: What do dental procedures, beach bods and hard hats have in common? They're in this episode of FAILARMY NOW.

programme.title: FailArmy Now
programme.desc: What do youthful senior citizens, dozens of pugs and water fountains have in common? They're on FAILARMY NOW.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Pets, toddlers, some kitchen klutzes, and mud all make an appearance and add to a massive total clean up time!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Watch the chaos unfold as heavy vehicle mishaps collide!!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.sub-title: Explosions, Spills, and Cats, Oh My!
programme.desc: Messes big and small come together to rack up a cleanup time that can only be described as huge!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: When kids and dogs make the mess, who cleans it up?

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Get your mops, forklifts, vacuums, and cranes ready- you’ll need all that and more to clean up today’s messes!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: The only thing worse than making a fool of yourself is how long it takes to clean up the damage!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: From walking down the aisle to tackling home improvement projects, messes abound on World’s Messiest Fails!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: It takes a lot longer to clean up a mess than it does to make it. A whole lot longer.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: This holiday season, people are getting exactly what they asked for: a big ol’ mess!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are able to create a composite sketch of a man burnt beyond recognition. But tracking the killer is more challenging.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a scientist is gravely ill. When tests reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver, and no witnesses, an ambush or a random attack; the clue was something so tiny, it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she'd always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college co-ed vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: James Kenneth Elmen Jr. abducted Julie Estes, then 21, from the Southside convenience store where she worked in 1985.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death, and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer made great effort to obscure the shoe impressions left when he tracked blood on the floor, but he ended up creating new incriminating evidence...

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police don't have a basis for comparison to match shoe impressions, blood drops and DNA evidence from a murder scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was found guilty of murder in the 1994 slaying at Perry's home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother and then packing her bloodied corpse in a box.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a state park employee over $2,000 rattles her co-workers and tourists while leaving police to sift through hundreds of leads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years later, DNA technology leads to justice for a murdered woman and her savagely beaten 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by his odd behavior toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappeared from the strip club she worked at in East Hartford, CT. Police look at various customers of the strip club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids home after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class and her husband Ken found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, Illinois emergency response came upon a garage fire and a man was found crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the Last Call Killer because he targeted men in gay bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, when teenager Tara Munsey goes missing after work, it is unknown if she ran away or was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found shot to death at home by his wife Miriam.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A body is found stuffed into a suitcase forcing the police to search though the landfill for another missing victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car and they find an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Series premiere. A flight attendant went missing and was never seen again. Police proved her husband guilty of murder without finding the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A boy is mysteriously shot in his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, scale models and animation reveal the bullet's amazing path and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappeared and her husband became the prime suspect especially after police found a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. Complex DNA testing proved it was the wife's blood. Now all they had to do was find her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: British detectives worked with a pioneering scientist to solve crimes of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Early one morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovered the body of a young woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia convention, 180 legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home and walked up the stairs to the bedroom. She discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered...but how? And by whom? Even the experts couldn't agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: From 1985 to 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, 121 people in South Dakota and Minnesota were struck by a mysterious illness. There had been only one outbreak like it, and when it happened again no one could figure out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his family members in his mansion before he disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An 11-year-old Boy Scout comes down with a fever and diarrhea after eating an undercooked burger. When his condition worsens, his mother drives him to a hospital and doctors discover E. coli destroying his body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Ten bodies had been found between May and November 1984 in Florida. A 17-year-old female named Lisa McVey was abducted but released, leading police to the perpetrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Almost a hundred vehicles were involved in the single most deadly automobile accident in American history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife Ruby Morris had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The results of the investigation surprised everyone...especially Earl Morris.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children proved to be something more serious: thallium poisoning.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb's head along with a note which read, "You next."

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant was rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there were more than 30 cases. Doctors searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak in Vancouver, British Columbia, a fire was set in a dumpster. No one saw either the arsonist or the fire, and it burned for hours in the deserted parking lot.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two people in Seattle, Washington died after taking an over-the-counter pain reliever. Lab analysis of the pills showed they were tainted with a lethal concentration of cyanide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For more than a year, hateful letters were sent to a school teacher in Pennsylvania. DNA analysis would eventually help seal the perpetrator's fate.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day. This time, the victim was injured but survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a small, quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy did not return home as planned. The investigation revealed some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Heavy rains and snow run-off carried manure into Milwaukee's water supply in 1993, leading to an epidemic of gastrointestinal illness affecting 400,000 people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Chad Shelton was admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding and later died. Investigators and scientists frantically searched for a cause when others from the same house fell ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude women were found on a remote hill of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a boy scout camp near Farmington, Missouri. A facial reconstruction aided the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession. A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Employing a range of forensic techniques, investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returned home after working the night shift and found his wife, Paula, unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their two-year-old son, Randy, was asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, was missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Stephen Scher and Martin Dillon went skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day and Martin was shot dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan died under suspicious circumstances, his mother was convicted of his murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Laura's bedroom was searched and forensic science was used to direct them a to prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was sentenced to three life terms in prison, but he steadfastly maintained his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-year-old boy was rushed to the hospital suffering from brain seizures and breathing difficulties.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. A tiny clue found years later revealed a tragic tale of drugs, romance and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother claims that an intruder murdered her two sons, but lacking a motive, police use blood-spatter analysis and behavioral profiling to reconstruct a different scenario.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Scott Dunn was missing and when the police sprayed his bedroom with Luminol, a scene of horrific violence emerged. Now investigators faced a daunting task.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 1995 fire razes the mansion of a Kansas doctor, killing two of her three children; disturbing accounts from an ex-husband lead investigators to believe the doctor set the blaze herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A husband confesses to his wife's murder, only to be found not guilty a year later when a phone tip and forensic evidence point to another.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Pennsylvania man checks into a hospital for leg pain and later dies of thallium poisoning, police investigate his wife and find her in the process of collecting an insurance payment for her previous husband's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of Karla Brown, murdered in her home in 1978, to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beverage company pleads guilty to violating federal safety laws when a baby dies from E. coli after drinking apple juice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After more than 20 people on a Native American reservation die suddenly from a flu-like disease, Navajo medicine men provide a clue that leads to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While at a real estate conference in St. Louis, a man finds his wife drowned in the bathtub in their hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her son, the obvious suspect is her husband. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses. But then the suspect vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dianna Green was brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child was killed. After coming out of a coma and regaining her memory, she is able to identify her husband as the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of an 11-year-old, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police charge a mentally unstable man with his wife's murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John Boyle in the disappearance of his wife when he buys a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find a body in the basement of his new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa as having led an attack against Jews during WWII.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim before his death provides clues to what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a surgeon is found dead in his home, police assume it was suicide. The investigation reveals otherwise.

programme.desc: Daily international culture news from the world's art, food and fashion capital, Paris.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 07: Milan at the Mediolanum Forum in Milan, Italy April 20, 2013. This event featured a super fight between Giorgio Petrosyan and Hafid El Boustati as headliner. In co-main event, Murthel Groenhart had to battle with fellow superstar Robin van Roosmalen, this event also featured non-tournament super fight series.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Glory 09: New York was a kickboxing event held on June 22, 2013 at the Hammerstein Ballroom in New York City, New York. This event featured a Glory 95kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E06 GLORY 10 Los Angeles SFS
programme.desc: GLORY 10: Los Angeles on September 28, 2013 at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California. The highlight of the event featured a Glory Middleweight World Championship Tournament.[15] Two tournament matches were held, with a third match as reserve. The winners of the two semi-final bouts, proceeded to the finals for the championship main-event. The event also featured eight other non-tournament bouts.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY returns to the US with a four-man Middleweight Tournament to decide the GLORY Middleweight title. Plus two lightweight match ups with Robin van Roosmalen taking on Shemsi Beqiri and Davit Kiria meeting Murthel Groenhart.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E87 K1 WGP 2008 Seoul - Final 16
programme.desc: Final Elimination tournament for the top sixteen Heavyweigh fighters. The winners qualified for the K-1 World GP 2008 Final.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Glory 09: New York was a kickboxing event held on June 22, 2013 at the Hammerstein Ballroom in New York City, New York. This event featured a Glory 95kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E06 GLORY 10 Los Angeles SFS
programme.desc: GLORY 10: Los Angeles on September 28, 2013 at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California. The highlight of the event featured a Glory Middleweight World Championship Tournament.[15] Two tournament matches were held, with a third match as reserve. The winners of the two semi-final bouts, proceeded to the finals for the championship main-event. The event also featured eight other non-tournament bouts.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY returns to the US with a four-man Middleweight Tournament to decide the GLORY Middleweight title. Plus two lightweight match ups with Robin van Roosmalen taking on Shemsi Beqiri and Davit Kiria meeting Murthel Groenhart.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: On the preliminary card, a 4-Man Featherweight Contender Tournament and other one-off bouts were featured.Mirko Cro Cop was first scheduled to face Pat Barry, and later Sergei Kharitonov on this card. However, on May 21, it was announced that Kharitonov had to withdraw from the fight due to injury. He was replaced by Jarrell Miller.Miguel Torres was scheduled to make his GLORY debut as a participant of the Featherweight tournament. However, on May 28, it was revealed he pulled out of the tournament for undisclosed reasons. He was replaced by Marcus Vinicius.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 GLORY Last Man Standing
programme.desc: "Last Man Standing" features a lineup of the world's top Middleweight talent: EIGHT men will fight to the finish in a ONE night tournament, with the tournament winner being crowned the GLORY Middleweight Champion of the World. Last Man Standing will also feature TWO World Title fights, including Daniel Ghita versus Rico Verhoeven for the vacant Heavyweight Title, and Marc de Bonte versus Joseph Valtellini as de Bonte defends his newly won Welterweight Title.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E88 K1 WGP 2008 Yokohama - Finals
programme.desc: The top 8 Heavyweight kickboxers in the world compete in a 1 day tournament to see who will be crowned World Grand Prix Champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: On the preliminary card, a 4-Man Featherweight Contender Tournament and other one-off bouts were featured.Mirko Cro Cop was first scheduled to face Pat Barry, and later Sergei Kharitonov on this card. He was replaced by Jarrell Miller.Miguel Torres was scheduled to make his GLORY debut as a participant of the Featherweight tournament. However, on May 28, it was revealed he pulled out of the tournament for undisclosed reasons. He was replaced by Marcus Vinicius.

programme.title: Brother Outlaw
programme.desc: A man is falsely charged with bank robbery, prompting his brother to break him out of prison.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: A gang working for The Shadow is terrorizing the town. John Travers decides to take on the job of sheriff and do something about it.

programme.title: Return of Sabata
programme.desc: Hobsonville's citizens hire a gunslinger to rid them of the McIntock clan that is forcibly and unlawfully taxing the townsfolk under the pretext of town development.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, Jack Murphy's gang turns on him when they suspect he’ll keep the loot. They torture him and kill his sister, but Jack survives. Now, he rides for revenge in this gritty Western tale of betrayal, violence, and retribution.

programme.title: Requiescant
programme.desc: The adopted son of a preacher comes upon a village that is under the thumb of a deranged ex-Confederate officer, who is - among other things - stealing land from the locals with phony land grants.

programme.title: Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: A quiet border town erupts into chaos as tensions rise between the US and Mexico. The cause? A ruthless Mexican bandit determined to kill as many US soldiers as possible. As political turmoil intensifies, the town becomes the center of a deadly conflict, where vengeance, power, and survival collide.

programme.title: Three Graves for a Winchester
programme.desc: Ringo Carson has a tough life. First, he has a falling out with his best friend, Frank Sanders, after saving Jane, the girl he loves, from Mexican kidnappers in order to extort a ransom from her gunrunner father.

programme.title: Git Along Little Dogies
programme.desc: When war breaks out between oilmen and cattle ranchers, Gene sides with the ranchers until he learns that oil will bring a railroad to town.

programme.title: Don't Wait, Django... Shoot!
programme.desc: Django returns home to discover that his father has been killed by local bandits in a business deal gone wrong.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: The Plunderers
programme.desc: Cavalry officer John Drum attempts to track down outlaw Whit Lacey, but finds he must join forces with Lacey to fight a Sioux war party.

programme.title: In a Colt's Shadow
programme.desc: A story about two gunfighters, Duke and Steve. Steve is in love with Duke's daughter but Duke disapproves of the match, envisioning a life of hardship and danger for the girl if she marries Steve.

programme.title: A Minute to Pray, a Second to Die
programme.desc: In Tuscola, New Mexico, the Governor offers amnesty papers to all outlaws but gunfighter Clay McCord's appearance triggers a violent confrontation between the local marshal, McCord, and other outlaws

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: A group of Mexican revolutionaries murders a town priest and a number of his christian followers. Ten years later, a widow arrives in town intent to take revenge from her husband's killers.

programme.title: Gunman of One Hundred Crosses
programme.desc: An Irishman is killed in the wild West. His son Jimmy goes out searching for the killers of his father, but is soon ambushed by two highwaymen, and killed, too.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid embarks on a dual mission: rescuing a girl from a marriage to a false suitor and tracking down outlaws who robbed a gold-carrying stage. His task becomes clearer when he discovers that the so-called wealthy suitor is secretly behind the robbery. Cisco must untangle love, deception, and crime to bring justice.

programme.title: White Fang
programme.desc: The wolf dog, White Fang, aids a reporter, a fur trapper, a nun, a young Eskimo boy and his father of ridding a gold mining town of a sleazy crime lord in 1896 Yukon, Canada.

programme.title: Django the Bastard
programme.desc: A ghostlike stranger arrives to avenge a Civil War betrayal. Former Confederate officers who caused the massacre of their own unit begin to die one by one, as Django delivers chilling justice from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Kill Django... Kill First
programme.desc: In a mining town, Johnny MaGee clashes with banker Anthony Burton, who uses bandits and deceit to seize gold mines and control the economy. Partnering with an old miner, Johnny seeks justice, while navigating love, betrayal, and alliances. As tensions rise, a bounty hunter joins the fray, promising a final showdown against corruption.

programme.title: Border Shootout
programme.desc: Young rancher Kirby Frye is appointed deputy in a small town tyrannized by ruthless Phil Sundeen, the son of one of the founders of the town.

programme.title: I Am Sartana, Trade Your Guns for a Coffin
programme.desc: Sartana, a bounty hunter and gunfighter, witnesses a gold robbery and arrives in a suspicious town run by Samuel Spencer. Hired to protect the next shipment, Sartana fends off numerous incompetent villains, surviving their attempts on his life. Meanwhile, his nemesis, Sabbath—known for his white coat and parasol—arrives in town. With tensions rising, Sartana and Sabbath are headed for a final showdown to settle the score.

programme.title: Killer Caliber 32
programme.desc: Hired gun Silver kills a masked gang’s seven members one by one, using silver bullets and his own code of justice. Between poker games and saloon girls, his mission leads to the dramatic unmasking of the gang’s ruthless leader. Silver’s style and honor make him a deadly force in this action-packed tale.

programme.title: Robbery Under Arms
programme.desc: Two brothers join their father in Captain Starlight's bush ranger gang in 19th Century Australia.

programme.title: A Lust to Kill
programme.desc: A cowboy escapes from jail with the help of his girlfriend, and goes after the men he believes are responsible for his brother being shot down by lawmen.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Old Western Movie from 1947 starring Roy Rogers directed by William Witney: Apache Rose - Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: Man with the Golden Pistol
programme.desc: Doc McGregor, former surgeon become player, is wrongly accused of murder and pursued by Slade, a bounty hunter.

programme.title: California Passage
programme.desc: Cowboy Movie - A series of reversals bring two desperate people together. When a saloon owner is framed by his partner for a stagecoach robbery, he fights to secure an acquittal.

programme.title: The Son of Zorro
programme.desc: In imperial Mexico, nobleman Don Ricardo secretly fights as the Son of Zorro against corrupt Governor Leblanche. When rebels ambush a weapons transport, killing Don Herrera, Ricardo rescues his daughter Conchita and hides her, fueling a revolution for justice and freedom.

programme.title: The Executioner of God
programme.desc: A former gunman turned priest seeks vengeance on three bandits who are masquerading as law-abiding citizens.

programme.title: Stranger On Horseback
programme.desc: Circuit judge Rick Thorne arrives in Bannerman and uncovers that rancher Josiah Bannerman and his family control the town. After Tom Bannerman kills a man with no consequence, Thorne steps in and arrests him. As he seeks allies, including Amy Lee, the rancher's niece, Thorne faces pursuit, betrayal, and the challenge of getting Tom to trial.

programme.title: Buckaroo: The Winchester Does Not Forgive
programme.desc: The Winchester Does Not Forgive - When the stagecoach in which they travel is attacked by Monteiro's gang, Lash accepts to kill his friend to save his bacon.

programme.title: A Few Bullets More
programme.desc: Billy starts as an innocent outlaw protecting his mother but soon becomes a ruthless killer. When love gives him hope for change, Pat Garrett, a fatherly friend, helps him try to turn his life around. Yet fate drags Billy back into violence, and Garrett is ultimately credited with his death.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Whether you're a pro or a beginner, everyone is welcome to join the Road Grill team at the 19th tee where Matt is busy burnin' up his Q's. What better way to end your day at the links with an enticing menu of Miso Citrus Grilled Sablefish, Smoked Rack of Pork with a Sour Cherry Sauce , Lemon Basil Smashed Potatoes with Mushrooms, Arugula Salad with Peaches, and Blue Cheese and Walnuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: In between hoisting sails and scrubbing the deck, Matt and his team prepare a feast for the sailors before going on a long voyage. Not only is the weather perfect for sailing, it's perfect for BBQing! The menu: Scallop Corn Bacon Burger, Maple-apple Brined Pork Chops, Grilled Tuna Bruschetta, and Strawberry Marscapone Trifle.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Day at the Pool
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. The menu: Grilled Chicken Legs with Crunchy Chip Crust, Smoked Ham with Maple Mustard Glaze, Planked Asparagus Bundles with Cheese and Prosciutto, and Cobb Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Four Flavours, Four Dishes…One Multi-Cooker!
programme.desc: Using just one pot, host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks four delicious dishes including Peachy Pulled Pork Tacos and a Lime and Basil Pie.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Hearty Weeknight Multi-Cooker Dishes
programme.desc: Do you know the secret to an uncracked cheesecake? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco shares her trick to making a perfectly silky-smooth Salted Caramel Cheesecake.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Classic Sunday Dishes Made in Weeknight Time
programme.desc: Charming cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four multi-cooker dishes that save on time but are bursting with flavour.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Four Fresh Dinners that are Always on Time
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four dinners in minutes using her multi-cooker including a delicious Lasagna and mouth-watering Burrito Bowl with Chermoula.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Eat your Fruits and Veggies
programme.desc: Don't forget to eat your fruits and veggies! Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to include nutritious ingredients into our decadent desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a sweet taste of chocolate heaven with an overload of chocolatey desserts including a decadent Bombe au Chocolat.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: High tea requires royal desserts! Host Jessica McGovern gives us the lowdown on some sophisticated sweets to pair with a warm cup of tea.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Talented host Jessica McGovern shows us how to impress both kids and adults with three ovERS-the-top desserts including a magical Geode Cake.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Here's a tongue twister: Theresa, tuna, tangerine! In this episode, host Theresa Visintin picks her favourite letter, "T," and introduces us to scrumptious recipes using tuna and tangerine. Theresa loves tuna and Italian cuisine, so naturally she combines both to create a mouth-watering pasta with some savoury tomato, olive, and tuna sauce. Next, Theresa satisfies her sweet tooth with a decadent tangerine parfait! Using the sweet juice of the tangerine, Theresa creates gelatin, with a hint of orange liqueur. She tops it all off by whipping up a fluffy cream to complete this sweet treat. Then it's time for a real challenge: tuna and tangerine in one recipe!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this "H" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to take on the unique flavours of halibut and horseradish. She starts with a perfectly prepared prosciutto wrapped halibut, pairing the buttery flavour of the fish with the saltiness of the cured meat. Throw in some dill potatoes and you've got a beautifully balanced dish. Next up, Chef Lauren show us how to make a delightful roast beef dip with a zesty horseradish sauce using carrots, vinegar, mayo and a little lemon. Finally, she is challenged to make a dish that combines both ingredients, and does she ever deliver!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this letter "P" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell showcases his vegetarian skills using pecans and peppers. Despite his cowboy roots, Robert shows us he can kick it with vegetarians by cooking up a juicy meatless "meatloaf" using pecans. But, no "meatloaf" would be complete without a gravy! Robert fries up earthy portobello mushrooms before adding a special ingredient to thicken the gravy, you guessed it -- pecans! Now, on to peppers. Robert doubles up, using both the vegetable and seasoning, to make a delicious red pepper coulis with herb and pepper crusted beef tenderloin. Robert goes a little nuts when he prepares his final recipe using both pecans and peppers.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Cheese or chocolate? Why not both! In this "C" challenge, host Theresa Visintin takes on both decadent ingredients. But first, she shows us that being cheesy is easy, especially when you stuff chicken breast with creamy goat's cheese and finely diced apples. Theresa takes the flavour one step further by coating the stuffed chicken with sage, parmesan, and panko bread crumbs, then frying it to a crispy golden brown. Next, Theresa whips up a dessert fan favourite, the decadent and oh-so-irresistible dark chocolate lava cake. Finally, Theresa has an irresistible recipe using ooey gooey cheese and warm chocolate.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Endearing host Tyrone Edwards surprises South African-born Shameen Miller with the results of her DNA test. Shameen cooks a meal that combines her two cultures and shares it with her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards shocks Andrea Titus with her DNA results. Blending her two cultures onto one plate, Andrea then cooks up a delicious and revealing meal for her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Laird Hercules that his DNA includes other ancestry besides Guyanese. In the DNA Dinners kitchen, he cooks up a delicious meal that combines his known and newfound cultures.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Mary Bosco is Italian, but Host Tyrone Edwards surprises her by revealing that her DNA test includes roots from other places. Mary cooks a special meal for her family that combines her two cultures.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Magic in the Middle
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a little surprise on the inside by baking up tasty filled goodies.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Make hosting your next shower a cinch with Jessica McGovern's simple and super cute recipes - like tiny Oatmeal Cookie Cheesecake Cups!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Flowers aren't just for smelling - they're great for baking too! Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake some tasty desserts with a floral twist.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us the versatility of eggs by baking up some tasty, egg-centric desserts like CrÍ¨me Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: For this "N" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas works with noodles and nectarines. For her first dish, Lauren cooks up a breaded nectarine and mozzarella stack. Talking technique, she shows us how to cut nectarines into rounds. She does the same with some soft mozzarella and then walks us through the art of a balsamic reduction. For the noodles, Chef Lauren puts an elegant twist on your childhood favourite with a lobster mac and cheese. She spares no flavours, adding fried bacon, garlic, cayenne pepper, mustard powder, and even dry vermouth. This is no ordinary noodle dish. But now for the real challenge! Chef Lauren works with the noodles and nectarines.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Culinary expert Theresa Visintin picks the letter "B" and must combine beef with buttermilk for her challenge. But first, she works with the ingredients separately. Silky buttermilk lends itself perfectly to Theresa's battered blooming onion recipe. Using the biggest onion she can find, Theresa skillfully slices from the root down, ensuring it will bloom into a beautiful flower. She coats the Vidalia onion in egg, buttermilk and smoky spiced flour, before deep frying it. Next up, it's time for beef to get the Theresa treatment, as she prepares a crowd favourite- smoky, juicy, fall-off-thebone baked beef brisket. With the perfect balance of sweet and spicy, this meal will make you look forward to leftovers...if there are any! Now for the challenge - Theresa skillfully blends beef with buttermilk in a recipe that will tempt your taste buds.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: After picking "M" for this episode's challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic using maple and mahi-mahi. She starts by combining chestnut and quinoa to create a mouth-watering medley, rich in flavour and texture. Chef Lauren adds shiitake mushrooms and drizzles the dish with a balsamic vinegar, maple syrup and rosemary dressing. Next up, she steams Mahi-mahi with red chilies and lemongrass, this savoury spice is a heavenly combination with an invigorating aroma. For the challenge, Chef Lauren seamlessly introduces both maple and mahimahi into one flavourful fusion.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Southern Smoke & Sizzlin' Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a beef brisket, whip up some delicious Texas sides, and show you how to smoke a daikon!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Famed Chef Michael Bonacini celebrates the food of the Italian Riviera as he shows viewers delicious dishes from Liguria.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Emilia Romagna is the culinary heart of Italy and Chef Michael Bonacini shows viewers how to make some of the region's most delicious dishes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Renowned Chef Michael Bonacini takes viewers on a culinary tour of the Italian region of Trentino-Alto Adige without leaving his own kitchen.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Charming host Chef Michael Bonacini explores the mountainous region of Basilicata with a feast fit for any celebration. Beginning with an antipasto that caters to the region's southern heat, Michael stuffs crunchy sweet peppers with ripe tomatoes, savoury anchovies, and fresh oregano. Moving on to the primo, Michael cooks up a creamy Vermicelli Frittata. Using leftover pasta, he combines eggs with cheese, anchovies, and chili flakes for extra flavour to make a classic Basilicata dish. Michael cooks up Pollo Alla Potentina, a traditional meal from the Feast of Saint Gerard. This hearty chicken stew is sure to heat up your core, using hot peppers as the base of the meal. For his final dish, Michael combines the rich tastes of pomegranate, walnuts, and dark chocolate to create his unique Sweet Wheat Bowl.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: Up the Dish host Micah Trainor tries her hand at an Italian original - Veal Piccata! Lemony, buttery, capERS-y veal melts in the mouth after being pounded supERS-thin and seared to perfection. Poppy Sandler's sideways switch-up is a Caper Almond Crusted Halibut, sizzled and baked until gorgeously golden-brown and flaky, then garnished with chives and pea shoots. Next, Missy Hui goes Greek with her vegetarian Avgolemono, a silky-smooth citrusy soup starring lemon and egg, garnished with orzo and shimeji mushrooms. Tiera Singh ties it all together with her Sumac Veal Sweetbreads with a rough chopped caperberry-olive tapenade - browned veal sweetbreads are sprinkled with tart sumac and laid on a bed of tapenade, then drizzled with a sweet 'n' sour pomegranate molasses vinaigrette.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: First up on this episode of Up the Dish is Poppy Sandler's Borscht straight from the Eastern Bloc! A mix of roasted and simmered beets adds complexity to the creamy soup - and don't forget that vivid burgundy hue. Tiera Singh swaps soup for a sandwich with her Beet-Stained Trout Gravlax, pairing the eye-catching seafood with zesty lemon-dill cream cheese and rye pumpernickel bread. Next, Micah Trainor mixes up a vegetarian Roasted Beet Salad paired with crackly Seed Brittle and a simple sweet dressing; it's a crunchy, earthy delight! Missy Hui's three-layer Red Beet Velvet Cake is a true triple threat. Red beet puree gives this cake its vermillion colour - and pairing it with tangy goat cheese icing... well, it just makes sense!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, host Micah Trainor takes a stab at Cassoulet with buttery white beans, duck leg confit, and flavourful French sausage - and the result is mouth-wateringly good! The pressure's on, but Tiera Singh doesn't let up with her Chinese Long Bean Stir Fry. Succulent sausage, delicious duck breast, and flavorful vegetables come together for a truly sumptuous dish! For her vegetarian variant, Missy Hui must move things up a notch, but how? Agedashi Tofu! Breaded crispy semi-firm tofu is doused in a dashi, gochujang, and mirin mixture for the ultimate umami mouthful. Poppy Sandler goes above and beyond with her Chocolate-crusted Elk Loin, seared and drizzled with a decadent Coffee- Blueberry Demi-Glace - sound strange? Tastes terrific!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: How do you make any lasagna recipe better? Ask Tiera Singh to take it up, of course! Her 'Nonna-style' bechamel and Bolognese-based Lasagna is topped with melty mozzarella for a luscious and luxuriant dish. Tiera tosses it over to Poppy Sandler, whose sideways Seafood Lasagna mixes up mussels, shrimp, and a briny bechamel sauce - yum! Next, Micah Trainor makes a dressed-up vegetarian version of the classic - her Zucchini-Mushroom Lasagna Rolls with tangy sundried tomatoes, savoury ricotta cheese, and earthy mushroom duxelles is simply superlative. Missy Hui hits the sweet spot with her Chocolate Raspberry Dessert Lasagna; layers of rich white chocolate, thick raspberry coulis, and velvety mascarpone cheese come together for a dessert that's in the stratosphere!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: Host Poppy Sandler kicks off Up the Dish with her version of mom's spaghetti - a scrumptious Spaghetti Pomodoro that takes it to the top! Next up to the plate is Missy Hui, who hits it out of the park with her heavenly Bun Viet, a sweet and sour vermicelli noodle bowl and citrusy lemongrass grilled pork combo. Then, Tiera Singh takes up the challenge with her vegetarian Miso Ramen - an umami flavour bomb of miso, mirin, and even more noodle goodness. But there's nowhere to go but up with Micah's Lobster Cantonese Chow Mein, an elegantly upscaled rendition of Chinese noodles with bright ginger, tender gai lan, and crisp chow mein, all coated in an exquisite black bean sauce.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: Get ready for a not-so-raw deal in this episode of Up the Dish! Host Poppy Sandler sets things in motion and slices up a simple, elegant Sashimi with tangy Ponzu and tart Wasabi Mayo on the side. Missy Hui gets carnivorous with Lamb Carpaccio and Dukkah - delicate raw lamb and a Middle Eastern-style dip served with some delicious pita! But wait, what's a vegetarian to do with all this meat? Tiera Singh's got the answer - island-style Poke Bowls, with fruit instead of fish. Refreshing watermelon is marinated in a savoury, soy-based sauce and served with rice. For the finale, Micah Trainor Up('s) the Dish with her Scallop Tartare and Beet Chips, combining raw scallops with ultra-decadent truffle oil and sour cream.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from an award-winning cookbook: Chinese-ish by Joanna Hu and Rosheen Kaul! Follow along as Shahir makes fried rice fit for a billionaire, Australian-inspired shrimp toast, comforting chicken soup, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Pasta Every Day by Meryl Feinstein! Follow along as Shahir demonstrates how to make a variety of pasta shapes, like cavatelli, farfalle, and gnocchi, complete with delicious sauces!

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Classics with a Twist
programme.desc: When planning a multi-course dinner for six, we all think 'go with the classics' and so does sassy chef-host Kim Lallouz. For her, however, it's Classics... with a Twist! Use the One big Recipe and cook along as Bread and Butter gets a smoke, honey, herb, and black sea salt makeover. Next, Shrimp Cocktail is reinvented with a horseradish kick in her Apricot Ketchup. Then, it's Potato Pave as a standalone course, garnished with tangy tarragon crÍ¨me fraiche and briny salmon roe. Prime Rib is as classic as it comes, but with a sous-vide twist and truffle-spiked Pea and Lardon salad, plan to drop everything so you can twist along! For a sweet ending, dress up dessert from your favourite bakery with a cool trick for making easy lavender ice cream. Dinner is love, and you will love this dinner!

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.desc: Spring is in the air for this multi-course dinner One Big Recipe with engaging Chef Kimberly Lallouz. First up, it's Scallop Crudo, and it's peachy! Literally! Lamb Shanks braised with olives and sun-dried tomatoes are next, as an appetizer ragout, lovingly stuffed into pillowy, perfect mini-Yorkshire Puddings. Next, verdant spears of asparagus appear, topped with creamy, crunchy, soft-cooked egg Sauce Gribiche. Halibut is the main event, pan-roasted steaks are served over king trumpet Dill Pesto Mushrooms and finished with many melty coins of punchy Pink Peppercorn Compound Butter. The entire dinner is laid out in the signature One Big Recipe format, easy to follow, easy to make and guaranteed to impress!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Cheese Please! The Ultimate Melty Masterpieces
programme.desc: Comfort and indulgence meet in the griddle’s glow as cheese turns to molten perfection. From timeless classics to inventive creations, these dishes stretch, crisp, and bubble, proving everything tastes better with a little golden melt.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: Spice lovers rejoice as the griddle ignites with bold flavor. From smoky peppers to bright heat and layered seasoning, this exploration celebrates the art of balancing fire and flavor. Home cooks experiment with spice to create dishes that bring warmth and excitement to every bite.

Tiera Singh ties it all together with her Sumac Veal Sweetbreads with a rough chopped caperberry-olive tapenade - browned veal sweetbreads are sprinkled with tart sumac and laid on a bed of tapenade, then drizzled with a sweet 'n' sour pomegranate molasses vinaigrette.

programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Jimmy Butler sits down with Sean Evans for his date with the wings of death. As he battles the heat, he discusses his BFF relationship with Mark Wahlberg, talks about shoot-offs with Michael Jordan and offers a tutorial on how to tie a bandana.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Chelsea Handler battles the wings of death with Sean Evans and discusses dogs, thirst traps, 50 Cent and so much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: DeVine takes on the wings of death in the first-ever "Hot Ones" Fourth of July special. Along the way, he channels Macho Man Randy Savage, discusses his hilarious "Pitch Perfect" audition and explains why his dad hung up on Joe Biden.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: The comedian discusses tech bros, breaks down his favorite video games and explains his obsession with "The X-Files." Kumail becomes the first guest in "Hot Ones" history to dine with a knife and fork.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Half-Cajun, half-Jewish star Shia LaBeouf battles the brand new "Hot Ones" lineup and discusses everything from wrestling with Tom Hardy to giving Kanye West his "Indiana Jones" hat.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: The man behind "Punk'd" takes on the wings of death and covers a wide gamut of topics from Diddy stories and court side shenanigans to biochemistry and Elon Musk.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Noel Gallagher is a rock 'n' roll legend from Oasis, currently with Noel Gallagher's High Flying Birds.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Winterfell legend Maisie Williams battles the (vegan) wings of death and discusses everything from appearing on Binging with Babish to "Game of Thrones" myths and that time Drake shouted her out at the Billboard Music Awards.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Nick Offerman is an actor and comedian best known for his role as Ron Swanson on "Parks and Recreation."

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Brad Leone answers burning questions from Bon Appétit co-star Claire Saffitz, explains the joys of noodling with Matty Matheson and teaches Sean Evans a few Turkey Day tricks.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Vlog Squad leader David Dobrik takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from collaborating with Justin Bieber to meeting Robert Downey Jr. and his dreams of hosting a late-night show.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Big Sean and Sean hang out over hot wings. The Detroit emcee discusses ranch life with Kanye West, breaks down hip-hop's love of Stan Van Gundy and struggles to maintain his Buddha-like calm.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Zac Efron takes on the wings of death with Sean Evans, channeling Shia LaBeouf as he pops bottles of hot sauce along the way. From throwback basketball tricks to paparazzi advice from Leonardo DiCaprio, this episode has it all!

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake is one of the century's most prolific singer-songwriters, with 10 Grammy Award wins.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Watch Tom Segura reunite with Sean Evans over a brand new hot sauce lineup, discussing everything from Dave Chappelle's surprise special to his beef with pro wrestling and love for Missy Elliott.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Brie Larson is the box office-shattering star you know from films like Room, Captain Marvel and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Watch as Eric Andre melts down in his own home, chugging milk and screaming non-sequiturs while discussing everything from the genius of Sacha Baron Cohen to his thoughts on comedy skits on classic rap albums.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Despite some words of encouragement from Kristen Stewart, Dan Levy is not too confident going into his date with the wings of death. As he tackles the sauce gauntlet, Dan discusses Drake, sweaters, Jason Biggs and much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: The popstar behind smash hits like "Don't Start Now" and "Physical" faces off against the wings of death and discusses everything from seeing 50 Cent live in Kosovo to the enduring appeal of Goosebumps sweatpants.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: The gregarious crooner and beloved "Hot Ones" legend T-Pain slams flats and drums while discussing his cartoon Mount Rushmore, his triumph on the "Masked Singer" and much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: A dear friend of "Hot Ones," Adam Richman, takes on the sauces and wings while discussing his top five iconic Brooklyn eating establishments, the influence of WWII on how Americans eat today, urban gardening tips and his favorite food rap lyrics.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Action Bronson is a rapper, chef and NYT best-selling author - and is in the hot seat for a round two.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: How will acting legend Drew Barrymore, who has over 70 film and TV credits to her name, handle hot sauces?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt is answering questions about the power of YouTube while facing the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is an actress whose career checks every box, from big budget blockbusters to TV cult classics.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Ronda Rousey is a former bantamweight champion and the first woman to be inducted in the UFC Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: See how this runway GOAT handles the levels of spice while answering questions about the evolution of the supermodel and her love of foods from around the world.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Watch how Matthew McConaughey fares against the wings of death while answering questions about his writing process, what makes romantic comedies work and how helpful New Yorkers really are.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Sam Smith is a Grammy Award-winning singer and songwriter who also holds multiple Guinness World Records.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Watch if Icy Girl Saweetie can stay cool while answering questions about leveraging the power of the Internet to fuel virality, how freestyling informs her songwriting process and her love of hot dogs from Costco.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Lover of anime Thundercat reveals the cartoons with the best theme songs, video game soundtracks, Marvel movies, his bass-playing days with Suicidal Tendencies, his love of bowling and the first time he met Sean in Los Angeles at The Comedy Store.

programme.title: Kidnapping Mr. Heineken
programme.desc: Sisäpiirin tarina olutmoguli Alfred "Freddy" Heinekenin sieppaajien suunnittelusta, toteutuksesta, rajuista jälkimainingeista ja lopullisesta tuhosta vuonna 1983, mikä johti suurimpiin koskaan maksettuihin lunnaisiin yksilöstä.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: Sin-Dee Rella on palannut kaduille oltuaan 28 päivää vankilassa. Hän on transnainen ja prostituoitu ja tapaa ystävänsä ja kollegansa Alexandran, joka kertoo hänelle, että Sin-Deen parittajapoikaystävällä oli suhde hänen poissa ollessaan. Sin-Dee näkee punaista, eikä Alexandra voi kuin lähteä mukaan petturimiestä metsästämään. Tangerine osui amerikkalaiseen indieskeneen kuin pommi, ja siitä alkoi Sean Bakerin (The Florida Project, Anora) arvostettu ohjaajanura.

programme.title: Cold War
programme.desc: Cold War on intohimoinen rakkaustarina miehestä ja naisesta, Wiktorista ja Zulasta, jotka tapaavat toisensa sotienjälkeisen Puolan raunioissa. Nämä kaksi täysin erilaisen taustan ja mielenlaadun omaavaa ihmistä ovat toistensa täydelliset vastakohdat, ja silti auttamattomasti tuomittuja kuulumaan toisilleen. 1950-luvun kylmän sodan aikaiseen Puolaan, Berliiniin, Jugoslaviaan ja Pariisiin sijoittuvassa tarinassa pariskunnan erottavat toisistaan poliittiset käänteet, tuliset luonteet ja onnettomat kohtalon oikut - mahdoton rakkaustarina mahdottomana aikana.

programme.title: Viides Valta
programme.desc: He perustivat vallanpitäjiä hätyyttävän nettisivun ja heistä tuli maailman jahdatuimpia ihmisiä. WikiLeaksin perustajat Julian Assange ja Daniel Domscheit-Berg saivat haltuunsa kaikkien aikojen suurimman määrän luottamuksellisia ja vuodettuja tietoja Yhdysvaltain puolustusministeriöstä. Silloin käynnistyi sisäinen taistelu. Paljonko kannattaa maksaa vapaan maailman suurimmista salaisuuksista? Mitä niiden paljastaminen maksaa?Daniel Domscheit-Bergin oma kirja WikiLeaksista on pohjana aidolle trillerille, joka kertoo aikamme keskustelluimmasta ja ristiriitaisimmasta organisaatiosta WikiLeaksista ja sen perustajasta Julian Assangesta.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Bob Ho on kansainvälinen agentti, joka on ollut mukana vaikka missä: takaa-ajoissa, räjähdyksissä, putoamisissa. Ne eivät kuitenkaan ole mitään verrattuna hänenseuraavaan tehtäväänsä: hänen pitää hoitaa tyttöystävänsä kolmea kakaraa! Jo aamiainen ja koulumaksujen hoitaminen ovat rankkoja tehtäviä, mutta kun yksi lapsista suututtaa venäläisen terroristin, viikonloppu saa aivan uudenlaisen käänteen.Jackie Chaniin ei väsy koskaan eikä Jackie Chan ole koskaan liian vanha näyttämään taistelulajiosaamistaan tai tekemään vaarallisia stuntteja, sillä jälleen kerran hänellä on vastassaan vihollisia: pieniä lapsukaisia!

programme.title: The Mothman Prophecies
programme.desc: Journalisti John Klein ja hänen vaimonsa Mary joutuvat kohtalokkaaseen onnettomuuteen. Vaimon kuoleman jälkeen Johnin pakkomielteeksi muodostuvat Maryn sairaalassa tekemät luonnokset, jotka kuvaavat tummaa, siivekästä hahmoa. Pari vuotta myöhemmin eräällä juttumatkallaan John ajaa selittämättömällä tavalla muutamassa tunnissa satoja maileja ja joutuu Point Pleasantin pikkukaupunkiin. Poliisi Connie Parker kertoo seudulla sattuneista havainnoista: yöperhosmainen punasilmäinen olio on ilmestynyt useille paikkakuntalaisille...

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Nuori pari Simon (Bateman) ja Robyn (Hall) törmäävät sattumalta kaupassa Simonin vanhaan ja miltei unohdettuun tuttavaan, erikoislaatuiseen Gordoon (Edgerton). Miehen yltyvä kiinnostus pariskuntaa kohtaan, mystiset lahjalähetykset ja lopulta synkkä paljastus Simonin menneisyydestä riuhtaisee heidän seesteisen elämänsä kammottavaan syöksykierteeseen.

programme.title: Love The Coopers
programme.desc: Cooperien iso perhe kokoontuu viettämään joulua yhdessä, mutta perinteisiä kuvioita sotkevat yllätysvieraat.

programme.title: Before Midnight
programme.desc: Tapaamme Jessen ja Celinen lähes kaksi vuosikymmentä sen jälkeen, kun he tapasivat ensi kerran junassa matkalla Wieniin. Vuosien vierittyä he asuvat nyt yhdessä Pariisissa.
Nuoren kirjailijan on hyväksyttävä kuolevaisuutensa kun hänellä todetaan harvinainen syöpä.Parhaan ystävänsä ja empaattisen nuoren terapeutin avulla hän löytää rohkeuden taistella sairautta vastaan.

programme.title: Le Havre
programme.desc: Parhaan elokuvan Jussi-palkinnon voittaja ja myös kansainvälisesti palkittu elokuva, voitti myös 2011 Cannesin elokuvajuhlilla, elokuvakriitikkojen järjestön Fiprescin palkinnon, parhaan koiranäyttelijän sekä ekumeenisen tuomariston palkinnot. Le Havre kertoo kengänkiillottajasta, joka yrittää pelastaa pakolaislapsen.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Ray Keene (John Cusack), isä, joka haluaa lunastaa paikkansa poikansa (Jamie Anderson) silmissä, yrittää saada maailmanluokan salamurhaajan Cardenin (Morgan Freeman) oikeuden eteen. Samaan aikaan hänen on suojeltava poikaansa ja väisteltävä salamurhaajan tiimiä, joka metsästää heitä metodisesti erämaassa.

programme.title: Imaginary Heroes
programme.desc: Nokkela, herkullisen ivallinen tarina perheestä, jonka kulissit alkavat sortua vakavan tragedian seurauksena. Perheen nuorin poika hautoo kipeää salaisuutta kuin pahan unen vankina. Äiti laukoo sarkastisia ajatuksia ja hukuttaa tuskansa pulloon ja naapurin yksinhuoltajaan. Katkeransuolaista huumoria, lämpöä, rakkautta ja kaikkea siltä väliltä.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Toimittajat matkustavat sotaisaan Bosniaan napatakseen sotarikollisen, mutta heitä luullaan CIA

programme.title: Majava
programme.desc: Majavasta voi olla apua sinullekin! Walter Blackin huumori on yhtä mustaa kuin hänen sukunimensä. Töissä menee huonosti, vaimo on saanut tarpeekseen ja poika vihaa isäänsä. Masennuksen syövereissä - ja kesken itsetuhoisen ryyppyputken - Walter löytää roskasäiliöstä nuhruisen käsinuken. Majavan. Kangasnukke kädessään Walter voi jälleen puhua vapaasti. Ja vieläpä brittiaksentilla! Mutta samalla kun Walter löytää itsensä uudelleen, uusi majavapersoona saa hänestä yliotteen! Kaksinkertaiset Oscar-voittajat Mel Gibson ja Jodie Foster ovat tehneet palkitun käsikirjoituksen avulla yhden vuoden omaperäisimmistä elokuvahelmistä.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Josh (Ben Stiller) ja Cornelia (Naomi Watts) ovat onnellisesti naimisissa. Perheen perustaminen jäi heiltä onnistumatta, mutta se ei heitä vaivaa. Tuskaillessaan uuden dokumenttielokuvansa valmistumisen parissa Joshista alkaa kuitenkin tuntua, että elämästä puuttuu jotain. Kuvaan astuu kaksi uutta tuttavuutta, huoleton nuoripari Jamie ja Darby. Nämä vapaat sielut ovat milloin tahansa valmiita heittäytymään uuden kiinnostavan harrastuksen pariin, uppoutumaan retro-lautapeleihin tai hankkimaan lemmikkikanan. He avaavat Joshille oven menetettyyn nuoruuteen - tai ainakin siihen mitä hänen nuoruutensa olisi voinut olla.

programme.title: A Walk to Remember
programme.desc: Paha poika Landon valitaan koulunäytelmään lukutoukka Jamien vastanäyttelijäksi. Heidän välilleen puhkeaa romanssi, mutta tragedia uhkaa repiä heidät erilleen.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: Danielin ja Robertin isän kuolema saattaa toraisan perheen yhteen suremaan vainajaa. Kun hautajaisiin ilmestyvä mies uhkaa paljastaa vainajan järkyttävän salaisuuden ellei saa rahaa, on veljesten keksittävä jotain päästäkseen kiristäjästä eroon. Seremoniasta sukeutuu täysi kaaos, kun he yrittävät estää uutisen kantautumisen saattoväen korviin.

programme.title: Autumn in New York
programme.desc: Will Keane on viittäkymppiä lähestyvä menestyvä newyorkilainen ravintoloitsija ja parantumaton naistenmies. Mies purjehtii suhteesta toiseen - kunnes hän kohtaa nuoren Charlotten. Vielä kokematon Charlotte on sulaa vahaa maailmanmiehen käsittelyssä, mutta romanssi saa tylyn lopun. Will tajuaa menettäneensä kenties viimeisen tilaisuuden todelliseen rakkauteen. Voiko vanha tiikeri päästä eroon raidoistaan? Will päättää yrittää...

programme.title: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: Tositapahtumiin perustuva komedia mallikansalaisesta Steven Russellista (JIM CARREY), jonka radikaalilla elämänmuutoksella on hintansa. Patologisen valehtelijan munaukset vievät miehen suoraan kaapista häkkiin, kun hän jää luksuselämänsä rahoittamiseen kehitetyistä superhuijauksista kiinni rysän päältä. Vankilassa Stevenin yllättää kuitenkin takaapäin rynnivä rakkaus, jota huijarin taipumukset ja poliisien pamput kuitenkin vaikeuttavat. Stevenillä on kuitenkin sairaita suunnitelmia rakastuneen parin saattamiseksi jälleen yhteen...

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: Kun neljä ulkopuolista näki sen, minkä isot pankit, media ja valtionhallinto kielsivät - maailmantalouden romahtamisen - he saivat ajatuksen isosta shorttauksesta. Rohkea sijoittaminen johtaa heidät pankkialan pimeälle puolelle, jossa kaikki on kyseenalaistettava. Adam Mckayn (Anchorman, Step Brothers) ohjaama elokuva perustuu tositarinaan ja Michael Lewisin menestyskirjaan (The Blind Side, Moneyball). Elokuvaa tähdittävät Christian Bale, Steve Carell, Ryan Gosling ja Brad Pitt.

programme.title: Upseeri ja vakooja
programme.desc: Elokuva kertoo kuuluisasta Dreyfusin tapauksesta, josta on kirjoitettu jo yli 125 vuoden ajan. Roman Polanski on tehnyt historiallisesta skandaalista elokuvan, jonka pääroolissa nähdään Oscar-palkittu Jean Dujardin (The Artist). Elokuva perustuu tositapahtumiin sekä Robert Harrisin samannimiseen bestselleriin. Harris kirjoitti myös elokuvan käsikirjoituksen yhdessä Polanskin kanssa.

programme.title: The Mothman Prophecies
programme.desc: Journalisti John Klein ja hänen vaimonsa Mary joutuvat kohtalokkaaseen onnettomuuteen. Vaimon kuoleman jälkeen Johnin pakkomielteeksi muodostuvat Maryn sairaalassa tekemät luonnokset, jotka kuvaavat tummaa, siivekästä hahmoa. Pari vuotta myöhemmin eräällä juttumatkallaan John ajaa selittämättömällä tavalla muutamassa tunnissa satoja maileja ja joutuu Point Pleasantin pikkukaupunkiin. Poliisi Connie Parker kertoo seudulla sattuneista havainnoista: yöperhosmainen punasilmäinen olio on ilmestynyt useille paikkakuntalaisille...

programme.title: Vetovoiman lait
programme.desc: Tehokkaat avioerolakimiehet Audrey Woods ja Daniel Rafferty ovat nähneet rakkauden menevän pieleen kaikissa pahimmissa skenaarioissaan – kuinka huonot heidän mahdollisuutensa voisivat olla?

programme.title: Unelmien Naapuri
programme.desc: Teräväpiirtokuvalla ja bonusmateriaaleilla varustettu Emile Hirschin, Elisha Cuthbertin ja Timothy Olyphantin tähdittämä riehakas komedia on kuumempi kuin koskaan! High Schoolista juuri valmistuva luokan priimus, Matthew Kidman haluaa saada koulun päätökseen ilman teinihörhöilyjen aiheuttamia ongelmia. Valitettavasti, ongelma muuttaa naapuriin, eikä Matthew pysty vastustamaan kiusausta.

programme.title: Kerttu ja hannu
programme.desc: Kertun ja Hannun tarina sijoittuu hamaan menneisyyteen, kaukaiseen maalaismaisemaan. Ruuasta ja työstä on pulaa, ja niiden perässä nuori Kerttu (Sophia Lillis) johdattaa veljensä metsään, jossa turvan ja helpotuksen sijaan nuoret kohtaavatkin pahuuden keskittymän.

programme.title: Child's Play (2019)
programme.desc: ”SE”-elokuvan tuottajien CHILD’S PLAY on täysin uusi versio pahasta Chucky-nukesta kertovasta kauhuklassikosta. Chuckyn äänenä kuullaan Mark Hamill. Kun Karen ostaa huippukehittyneen Buddi-nuken syntymäpäivälahjaksi pojalleen Andylle, hän kutsuu tietämättään pahuuden kotiinsa. Andyn täytyy saada aikuiset kuuntelemaan, jotta nukke saadaan pysäytettyä ennen kuin on liian myöhäistä.

programme.title: Welcome to Collinwood
programme.desc: Tuomiotaan lusiva taparikollinen Cosimo saa vihiä kaikkien aikojen keikasta. Miehen tyttöystävä Rosalind alkaa valmistella keikkaa kalterien ulkopuolella ja pian osingolle on tunkemassa vähintäänkin värikäs sakki ”ammattimiehiä”. Oman palansa saaliista haluavat niin turhautunut taiteilija kuin italialainen gigolokin, mutta alan miehiä näistä tuurikonnista ei saa tekemälläkään. Onneksi kokenut kassakaappimies Jerzy antaa tunareille pari neuvoa ja täydellinen rikos on lähempänä kuin koskaan!

programme.desc: A heavily pregnant woman is brutally attacked by her neighbor.
