programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck and Brian watch as a 5,000-pound power unit smash to the ground, denting the Electra and putting it out of commission. Mikey scrambles to manage the crisis while Joe races to England to try and purchase a backup Electra.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey's much-planned D-Day tribute parachute jump with 20 paratroopers hits a wall when Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 to the drop zone.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go?

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The curse of -40 hits Buffalo pilots Devan and Scott on a food mail flight up the Mackenzie Valley when a mysterious rise in oil pressure threatens to destroy one of the C-46's engines.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A vital ferry link is down, so Buffalo mounts an all-out campaign to airlift 100,000lbs of essential goods across the Mackenzie River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A multi-stop mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of white- knuckle obstacles.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Young pilots AJ and Andrew get the chance of a lifetime to fly the magnificent DC-3 specially equipped with skis to land on frozen strips.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Chief pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge; Electra expert Chuck faces off with a stubborn power unit; Rod's wife Sasha goes into labor.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe hires Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey; a DC-3 delivery mission goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts.

programme.title: Emergency S1 -
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 New Year In The Emergency Room
programme.desc: Tet, the Vietnamese New Year, is pivotal in Vietnam. Yet, for paramedics, it's a bustling time. Similarly, in Sydney, New Year's is famous, but New South Wales Ambulance paramedics have little time for festivities.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -
programme.desc: This week, we'll visit with Jackson Jordan and his narrow escape from death in the woods of Georgia after an attack from a pack of coyotes when he was only 16.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -
programme.desc: This week, Mischelle Hileman finds herself deep in the Oregon wilderness on an elk hunt when she gets lost, injured, and on the brink of death.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: In the season premiere, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer are back in the Saskatchewan bushland to test their survival skills…and it might be their last time. They are desperate to find a safe spot for shelter, and clash over their first catch.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: With base camp set up and the cold setting in, Chris and Casey must find food…fast. Their energy levels are depleting as they begin their hunt for moose. As time ticks on, the brothers must think on their feet to find food…or risk going hungry.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 -
programme.desc: Military snipers are trained in a variety of skills: detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition. Bottom line, a ton of cool shooting and science for Nick and Laura to explore!

programme.title: Survival Science S1 -
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Surviving a Lightning Strike
programme.desc: Laura and Nick travel to a state-of-the-art Direct Effects Lightning Test Lab. With some “explosive” experiments, they’ll determine the power lightning and how it behaves? And they’ll find out how can hunters and fishermen best protect themselves?

programme.title: Survivorman S3 -
programme.desc: Struggling down slick Norwegian slopes with 65 pounds of gear, an exhausted Les Stroud fights through his most difficult ten-day mission yet.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 -
programme.desc: Sick and plagued by parasites, Les Stroud battles torrential rain in Papua New Guinea before abandoning survival for a rare tribal celebration.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 -
programme.desc: Veteran bush pilot Bob Stanford risks everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive S2 -
programme.desc: Low on food, the five stars must rescue a "bleeding" expert before tackling a river assault course. One more celebrity is cut from the team.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive S2 -
programme.desc: Deep in the forest, the stars drink dung fluid and navigate a canyon waterfall. Tensions boil over before a terrifying 200ft rock face descent.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive S2 -
programme.desc: The final four build rafts to cross shark-infested waters and face a midnight ambush. Only three stars will survive the coast to reach the final.

programme.title: The Trail S2 -
programme.desc: No big game, but the storm is here. Laramy fights the rain and snow in a race for shelter.

programme.title: The Trail S2 -
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Howling at the Moon
programme.desc: A surprise encounter yields a feast. Laramy claims his meat and prepares for the trail ahead.

programme.title: Wardens S5 -
programme.desc: Fourth of July in Montana – Flathead Lake is where the party is at. But with the heat tempers flare and the free flowing alcohol combines to make a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Wardens S5 -
programme.desc: When the game ranges are opened up for Antler Shed Hunting its all hands on deck for the Montana Game Wardens. Reports of Bears, Mountain Lions and lost hunters keep the wardens busy.

programme.title: Wardens S5 -
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 Fun in The Sun
programme.desc: When Jet skies get too close to boats things can turn dangerous. And Warden Bryan Golie questions an angler in search for the truth.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 The Rick Collins Story
programme.desc: This week on Trip Gone Bad, a father and son set out on a cliff side sheep hunt, but one slip could mean life or death in this remote and unforgiving area.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -
programme.desc: This week, we'll learn the harrowing tale of a father's desperate attempt to save his son's life from a grizzly bear attack while out hunting together.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -
programme.desc: This week, we take a look back at our season's survival stories with a more in-depth look with the help of former Army Special Forces soldier, Terry Schappert.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: Saskatchewan’s bitter cold and unforgiving wind makes for brutal days and nights for Chris and Casey. A rainstorm adds more difficulty and discomfort. Mentally drained and hungry, the brothers must try new tactics to find food and warmth.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: The lack of hunting opportunities have drained Chris and Casey’s patience. Arguments ensue when they disagree over staying put, or portaging to a new lake. Signs of a bear remind the brothers that they must remain focused in order to stay alive.

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven’t eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 -
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in the dead of winter in Tennessee.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 -
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Blue Dot on the Map
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in a lake locked off in time in northern Florida.

programme.desc: Low on food, the five stars must rescue a "bleeding" expert before tackling a river assault course. One more celebrity is cut from the team.

programme.desc: The final four build rafts to cross shark-infested waters and face a midnight ambush. Only three stars will survive the coast to reach the final.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 -

programme.title: Dropped S7 -
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven’t eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 -

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 -
programme.desc: A rock-climbing disaster hurtles climber Craig DeMartino 100 feet down a granite cliff. A shattered heap of broken bones, Craig clings to life. In a split second, Craig’s life becomes an inspiring fight to survive.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 -

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S2 -

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S2 -

programme.title: Road Less Traveled S3 -
programme.desc: "In stunning Lago di Garda Jonathan attempts to pull off a paragliding maneuver which almost put him in a wet grave last summer. Nearby, in the city of Bolzano, he joins a crack helicopter rescue force to run rescue drills, but a real emergency might sink his mission. When it's time to leave, our host decides to take a one-of-a-kind white knuckle route over the majestic Dolomite mountains and all the way up to switzerland to visit a town that revolves, clockwise, around a single purpose. "

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet S3 -
programme.desc: Chris travels to China for a unique adventure, gets in touch with his inner pirate, checks out a pet friendly city in Australia, and visits a remote Pacific island where a bird species is under threat.

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet S3 -
programme.desc: Chris visits China and explores a masterpiece of history , is shadowed by giants on Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, takes on a photo challenge in his own Bondi backyard, and joins a safari to a coastal community, well off the grid.

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet S3 -
programme.desc: Chris takes on one of the world’s most amazing cities, in search of the old and the new, meets an island local that makes everyone smile, and is on the trail of the elusive Aussie platypus.

programme.desc: A man arrested for domestic violence threatens to put all the officers in jail. Inmates on kitchen duty get into a fist fight over a dish towel. A woman unsure about her sexual identity is arrested for trespassing at a friend’s home. Officers find an unusual bit of clothing when a man is changed into a jail uniform.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Prositutes discuss their risqu̩ occupation and explain their fees. An intoxicated woman doesn't want her blood drawn, and two shoplifters face the potential consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the “international police”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man believes he is an alien wrongfully arrested for obstruction. Claiming to be a law school student, a man just doesn’t understand why he was arrested for trespassing. A woman claims she swallowed her friend’s pills for good reason. A family reunion ends with a bruised and bloodied husband.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A night of karaoke results in a domestic-violence charge, and a drunk inmate starts a fight with his cellmate.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man is arrested at a popular theme park for public intoxication. A detainee swallows his earring during processing. Officers attempt to restrain a combative woman in custody.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated man thinks the doctors are CIA agents. A homeless karate practitioner's actions land him in an isolated cell, and a Canadian man with no pants wants to arm wrestle.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two agitated inmates are put in restraints to cool down. A suspected burglar expresses concern over a milk allergy, and an inmate becomes upset about the care given to her belongings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After refusing a breathalyzer test, an irate man bangs his head against plexiglass. A man transforms into a “cell warrior” within his holding pen. Soon to be released, an inmate considers the future.

programme.title: Nurse Betty
programme.desc: Betty katsoo uskollisesti lempisaippuasarjaansa “Syy rakastaa". Törmättyään kahteen ammattitappajaan katsoessaan yhtä sarjan jaksoa Betty muuttuu “Nurse Bettyksi" ja lähtee etsimään sydämensä valittua, tohtori David Ravellia. Betty hakee unelmiensa prinssiä hurjalla retkellä halki maan, mutta ehtiikö hän löytää miehen ennen kuin tappajat löytävät hänet?

programme.title: 68 Kill
programme.desc: Palkitun Trent Haagan ohjaama rakkaustarina feminiinisyydestä, maskuliinisuudesta ja 68 000 dollarin varkaudesta. Chip on simppeli kaveri, jolla on upea tyttöystävä nimeltä Liza. Liza tosin hankkii heidän elantonsa namusedältään, mutta toisaalta jokaisessa parisuhteessa on omat erikoisuutensa. Kun Liza ehdottaa, että he veisivät limaiselta hyväntekijältään ison tukun rahaa, Chip näkee naisessa puolen, josta ei ole tiennyt mitään… tai jonka olemassaoloa ei ole suostunut myöntämään. Nyt Chipillä on ase käsissään, tyttö peräkopissaan ja alle 24 tuntia aikaa selvitä melkoisesta sotkusta.

programme.title: Ohjelmat jatkuvat pian
programme.desc: Olemme pienillä kauneusunilla! Katso lisää Rakuten TV:n tarjoamaa ilmaisviihdettä.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Tositapahtumiin perustuva Mad Money seuraa kolmea erilaista naista, jotka ovat töissä Yhdysvaltain keskuspankissa. He muodostavat tuhoon tuomitun liiton varastaakseen pankista rahaa. Diane Keaton, Queen Latifah ja Katie Holmes johtavat tähtirikasta näyttelijäkaartia Callie Khourin komediassa siitä, mitä tapahtuu, kun rikos kannattaa… vuosien ajan.

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: Tyytymätön vaimonsa kuolemaan, englanninopettaja masentuu ja katkeroituu, mutta löytää silti mahdollisuuden uuteen rakkauteen.

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: Leo Palamino on epäonnistunut kirjailija, josta tuli tiskaaja. Nyt hänet tunnetaan ex-vaimon pitämästä blogista “Miksi olet paska”, josta on tullut suuri hitti. Sitten Leo tapaa Coletten, unelmiensa naisen… päivänä, jona Colette on menossa naimisiin täydellisen miehen kanssa.Peloton haaveilija Leo panee kaiken peliin näyttääkseen Colettelle ja maailmalle, mitä kaikkea hyvää on miehessä, joka tunnetaan vain huonoista puolistaan.

programme.title: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: Tositapahtumiin perustuva komedia mallikansalaisesta Steven Russellista (JIM CARREY), jonka radikaalilla elämänmuutoksella on hintansa. Patologisen valehtelijan munaukset vievät miehen suoraan kaapista häkkiin, kun hän jää luksuselämänsä rahoittamiseen kehitetyistä superhuijauksista kiinni rysän päältä. Vankilassa Stevenin yllättää kuitenkin takaapäin rynnivä rakkaus, jota huijarin taipumukset ja poliisien pamput kuitenkin vaikeuttavat. Stevenillä on kuitenkin sairaita suunnitelmia rakastuneen parin saattamiseksi jälleen yhteen...

programme.title: The Funeral Party
programme.desc: Felix Bush (Robert Duvall) haluaa suunnitella omat hautajaisensa ja pyytää apuja järjestelyihin paikalliselta hautausurakoitsijalta Frank Quinnilta (Bill Murray). Paikalla tulee olla jokaisen, jolla on kerrottavanaan tarina hänestä. Tärkeintä on, että riennoissa on mukana myös päivänsankari itse – elävänä. Herra Bushin ennen aikojaan vietetyt hautajaiset eivät ole perinteinen muistotilaisuus, vaan huhut katkaiseva tapahtuma, joka tulee muuttamaan ihmisten käsityksen omalaatuisesta erakosta lopullisesti.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Keskilännessä 2000-luvun alussa varttuva 16-vuotias Alice on aina ollut hyvä katolilainen, mutta kun viaton nettikeskustelu muuttuu rohkeaksi, hän löytää masturboinnin ja on syyllisyyden riivaama. Hän etsii pelastusta salaperäisestä uskonnollisesta retriitistä yrittäessään tukahduttaa halujaan, mutta se ei ole helppoa, varsinkin kun söpö yläluokkalainen alkaa flirttailla hänelle.

programme.title: Two Is Family
programme.desc: Samuel elelee huolettomasti Ranskan Rivieralla, kunnes kuvaan astuu yllättäen entinen ihastus, Kristin. Kristin ilmoittaa Samuelille, että tästä on tullut pienen tytön isä, ojentaa vauvan hänelle ja häipyy! Samuel tekee kaikkensa löytääkseen Kristinin Lontoosta, mutta tuloksetta. Samuel asettuu Lontooseen ja alkaa tehdä tv-ohjelmassa stunttihommia. Vuosien mittaan Samuelista kehkeytyy hyvä, vaikkakin epäsovinnainen isä. Tyttö on 8-vuotias, kun elämä mullistuu jälleen, sillä Kristin palaa kuvioihin.

programme.title: The Way Way Back
programme.desc: Rantakaupunkilomallaan 14-vuotias Duncan vieraantuu äidistään, joka pyrkii päättäväisesti saamaanuuden parisuhteensa toimimaan. Duncan näkee äidin juhlivaisen poikaystävän upottavienperheenrakennuspyrkimysten pinnan alle, eikä löydä paikkaansa perheen polskinnan keskellä. Hauskaja salamyhkäinen ystävyys vesipuiston seurallisen johtajan ja muiden epämääräisten työntekijöidenkanssa auttaa nuoren miehen lopulta altaan pohjalta takaisin aurinkoon.

programme.title: Tähtitytöt
programme.desc: 45 minuutin ajomatkan päässä Phoenixista sijaitsee pieni eläkeläisten asuinalue. Siellä palmut kurkottavat korkeuksiin katujen ylle, taivas on aina sininen ja ”taksi” (ambulanssi) ajaa ohi pari kolme kertaa päivässä – se on eläkeläisten viimeinen määränpää. Täällä asuvat Martha ja Sheryl, jotka perustavat Yhdysvaltojen ensimmäisen huutosakin yli 60-vuotiaille naisille. TÄHTITYTÖT perustuu tositarinaan.

programme.title: Dear White People
programme.desc: Neljä mustaa opiskelijaa opiskelee Ivy League -yliopistossa, jossa syntyy levottomuuksia, kun valkoiset opiskelijat järjestävät afroamerikkalaisteemaiset juhlat. Pilke silmäkulmassa elokuva tutkii rotuidentiteettiä ”post-rodullisessa Amerikassa” ja kertoo samalla tarinan oman tien löytämisestä maailmassa.

programme.title: Thanks for Sharing
programme.desc: Päällepäin ympäristökonsultti Adamilla, yksityisyrittäjä Mikellä ja ensiapulääkäri Neilillä ei ole mitään yhteistä, mutta he kaikki ovat mukana 12 askeleen ohjelmassa kohti vapautta riippuvuuksistaan. Adam ei uskalla heittäytyä uuteen rakkauteen, Mike yrittää raivokkaasti kontrolloida perhettään eikä Danny suostu myöntämään ongelmiaan, mutta haasteet ja pienet askeleet yhdistää miehet perheeksi, joka kannustaa, raivostuttaa ja kiittää toisiaan matkalla uuteen elämään.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Of Black
programme.desc: Tässä päättömässä spoofkomediassa, joka ottaa elokuvan "Fifty Shades of Grey" lempeään käsittelyynsä, tapaamme mystisen miljonäärin Christian Blackin, joka, huolimatta puutteellisista kyvyistään sängyssä, päättää vietellä ujon collegeopiskelijan Hannah Steelen ja johdattaa hänet "romantiikan" maailmaan.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: Sydämellisessäkomediassa elämänjanoinen spermanluovuttaja Paul (MARK RUFFALO) saa mahdollisuuden astua Nicin (ANNETTE BENING) ja Julesin (JULIANNE MOORE) elämään kolmikon yhteisten lasten kautta. Sateenkaariperheen elämä värittyyentisestään, kun huoleton Paul sotkee perheen kemioita.

programme.title: Ohjelmat jatkuvat pian
programme.desc: Olemme pienillä kauneusunilla! Katso lisää Rakuten TV:n tarjoamaa ilmaisviihdettä.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face The Music
programme.desc: Panokset ovat nyt korkeammat kuin koskaan aiemmin, kun aikamatkaajat William "Bill" S. Preston ja Theodore "Ted" Logan ovat jälleen vauhdissa. Nyt jo keski-ikäistyneet bestikset lähtevät uuteen seikkailuun täyttämään rockiin kietoutuvan kohtalonsa, kun vierailija tulevaisuudesta varoittaa, että vain heidän kappaleensa voi pelastaa maailmankaikkeuden. Matkan varrella kaksikon apuna ovat heidän tyttärensä sekä uudet historialliset hahmot – ja nähdäänpä mukana muutama musiikin legendakin!

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Paholainen ei ole koskaan ollut yhtä kuuma ja hulvaton! Brendan Fraser on onneton, rakkautta janoava tietokoneteknikko, joka lankeaa syntisen seksikkään Elizabeth Hurleyn uhriksi suostuessaan myymään sielunsa seitsemää toivomusta vastaan. Mutta ovelalla pimeyden prinsessalla on useampi ässä... hihassaan. Ja pian Elliotin elämästä tulee hysteerinen maanpäällinen helvetti.

programme.title: Eagle vs Shark
programme.desc: Lily on ujo pikaruokaravintolan tarjoilija, joka kirjoittaa kappaleita, kun kukaan ei kuule. Hän on rakastunut pelikaupassa työskentelevään Jarrodiin. Kun haiksi pukeutunut Lily päätyy juhliin kotkaksi pukeutuneen Jarrodin ja muiden nörttien kanssa, kipinät lentävät, ja kaksikon romanssi kehittyy mitä erikoisimmaksi suhteeksi. Taika Waititin (Jojo Rabbit, Thor: Ragnarök) debyyttielokuva Eagle vs Shark on ainutlaatuinen komedia, jonka pääosissa ovat Jemaine Clement (Flight of The Conchords, What We Do in the Shadows) ja Loren Horsley.

programme.title: Mies joka tiesi liian vähän
programme.desc: Yhdysvaltalainen videokaupan työntekijä luulee osallistuvansa katuteatteriesitykseen, jolloin häntä luullaan erehdyksessä kansainväliseksi vakoojaksi. Hän luovii tiensä läpi kokonaisen vakoiluverkoston päihittäen samalla Euroopan parhaimmat salamurhaajat.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: Karannutta vankia jahtaava agentti Malcolm Turner (Martin Lawrence) lähtee suorittamaan peitetehtävää ja pukeutuu määräileväksi ja isokokoiseksi mummoksi, joka mottaa yhtä kovaa kuin komentaakin.

programme.title: Hamekyttä - Pojasta Polvi Paranee
programme.desc: Todistettuaan murhan FBI-agentti Malcolm Turner (Martin Lawrence) ja hänen poikapuolensa (Brandon T. Jackson) joutuvat vetämään valeasut niskaansa ja ryhtymään tutkimuksiin – ainoastaan tytöille tarkoitetussa taidekoulussa. Entistäkin enemmän hauskuutta!

programme.title: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: Tositapahtumiin perustuva komedia mallikansalaisesta Steven Russellista (JIM CARREY), jonka radikaalilla elämänmuutoksella on hintansa. Patologisen valehtelijan munaukset vievät miehen suoraan kaapista häkkiin, kun hän jää luksuselämänsä rahoittamiseen kehitetyistä superhuijauksista kiinni rysän päältä. Vankilassa Stevenin yllättää kuitenkin takaapäin rynnivä rakkaus, jota huijarin taipumukset ja poliisien pamput kuitenkin vaikeuttavat. Stevenillä on kuitenkin sairaita suunnitelmia rakastuneen parin saattamiseksi jälleen yhteen...

programme.title: Seeking a Friend for the End of the World
programme.desc: Valtava asteroidi lähestyy Maata, ja viimeinen keino sen pysäyttämiseksi on juuri epäonnistunut. Ihmiset reagoivat 21 päivän päästä koittavaan maailmanloppuun varsin kirjavilla teoilla. Vakuutusmyyjä Dodgen ja naapurintyttö Pennyn tiet kohtaavat mellakoiden yltyessä ja he päättävät auttaa toisiaan matkalla kohti viimeisiä päämääriään.

programme.title: The Wedding Guest
programme.desc: Adam (Justin Long) on ​​edelleen rakastunut exään (Cobie Smulders). Joten kun hän ilmestyy hänen häihinsä osoittaakseen, että hän on siirtynyt eteenpäin, sarja hauskoja tapaamisia vain vahvistaa, että hän ei ole koskaan ollut rakastuneempi.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: Sydämellisessäkomediassa elämänjanoinen spermanluovuttaja Paul (MARK RUFFALO) saa mahdollisuuden astua Nicin (ANNETTE BENING) ja Julesin (JULIANNE MOORE) elämään kolmikon yhteisten lasten kautta. Sateenkaariperheen elämä värittyyentisestään, kun huoleton Paul sotkee perheen kemioita.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: PT-valmentajat (Cobie Smulders ja Guy Pearce) saavat tehtäväkseen saada uusrikas ja hyvin motivoitumaton asiakas (Kevin Corrigan) kuntoon. Pian tässä fiksussa ja hauskassa rakkautta ja ruumiinkuntoa käsittelevässä komediassa näiden kolmen elämä ammatti- ja yksityiselämä sotkeutuu umpisolmuun.

programme.title: The Rules of Attraction
programme.desc: Jessica Biel, James Van Der Beek ja Ian Somerhalder tuovat elämää ja naurua tähän rehelliseen, nokkelaan tarinaan yliopiston sosiaalisista ja seksuaalisista suhteista.

programme.title: Dead in a Week: Or Your Money Back
programme.desc: Yhdeksännen epäonnistuneen itsemurhayrityksensä jälkeen nuori mies ulkoistaa itsemurhansa salamurhaajan hoidettavaksi. "Jos olet tosissasi lopettamassa sen, tarvitset ammattilaisen apua."

programme.title: Ohjelmat jatkuvat pian
programme.desc: Olemme pienillä kauneusunilla! Katso lisää Rakuten TV:n tarjoamaa ilmaisviihdettä.

programme.title: Mies joka tiesi liian vähän
programme.desc: Yhdysvaltalainen videokaupan työntekijä luulee osallistuvansa katuteatteriesitykseen, jolloin häntä luullaan erehdyksessä kansainväliseksi vakoojaksi. Hän luovii tiensä läpi kokonaisen vakoiluverkoston päihittäen samalla Euroopan parhaimmat salamurhaajat.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Dad Longworth robs a Mexican bank, takes the loot, and leaves his partner Rio to be captured. However, Rio escapes capture and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire.

programme.title: Riders of the Deadline
programme.desc: The 50th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy films finds Hoppy in a vengeful mood. When his good friend Tim Mason is unjustly sent to jail and then killed when trying to escape, Hoppys bitterness gets him drummed out of the Texas Rangers. With the help of his pals California Carson and Jimmy Rogers, he sets out to expose the real culprits and clear Tims name. The usual cast is here, including William Boyd as Hoppy, plus Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers, and in one of his earliest roles, Robert Mitchum.

programme.title: The Gunman from Bodie
programme.desc: The Rough Riders, a popular group that thrilled audiences in the early 1940s, are after a gang of rustlers in this B-western from Hollywood's Poverty Row. Starring Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, and Raymond Hatton, this movie features everything from lawmen going undercover to the Rough Riders looking after an orphaned baby! Also, be on the lookout for the beautiful Christine McIntyre, who would go on to appear in several of the Three Stooges shorts for Colombia Pictures.

programme.title: Red Ryder: Ride, Ryder, Ride!
programme.desc: Red Ryder encounters bandits trying to hold up the stagecoach carrying the owner of the Devil's Hole newspaper, Libby Brooks and her brother Gerry. Red successfully drives off the attackers but becomes embroiled in further conflict, leading to a duel that nearly claims his life.

programme.title: Fighting Fury
programme.desc: A THRILLING TALE OF REVENGE AND REDEMPTION! Based on the story Triple Cross for Danger by the widely lauded Western author Walter J. Coburn, Fighting Fury is a thrilling take on the Western revenge drama. Portraying both a father and his son, star of silent and sound cowboy adventure films, Jack Hoxie (Trouble Busters, Law and Lawless) exudes the classic American rustic charm that still defines the genre. The film spins the yarn of Clay Hill Jr. (Hoxie), a Spanish-American boy raised by a Mexican servant who vows bloody vengeance on three malicious ranchers after they murder his parents and turn his life upside down. Featuring fine supporting performances from genre heavies Helen Holmes, Buck Conners and Western mainstay Fred Kohler.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine and Chester Conklin, two of Hollywood's all-time greats. This old-fashioned shoot-'em-up was directed by William Witney, who would go on to direct many of television's top western sagas, including Bonanza, Wagon Train, and The Wild, Wild West.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat Gallagher and his sidekick Stoney Crockett are Secret Service agents in the Old West, dispatched by the government to investigate crimes threatening the young nation. In this episode, the G-Men are sent to the Ozarks to track down gold stolen from the U.S. Government. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: An outlaw gang is stealing gold from Chinese placer miners, then driving off their claims with outrageous taxes. Because they're Chinese, they can't sue the local government agents. With Stoney posing as a Chinese miner and Pat pretending to be a representative of an Eastern engineering company, the U.S. government tries to bring an end to the careers of the outlaw gang and crooked state government agents.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat and Stoney take time out from their duties to try and collect the bounty posted on a legendary golden wolf that roams the Colorado foothills. A couple of wolf hunters don't take kindly to a pair of amateur hunters horning in on their range and attempt to drive the G-Men away before they can capture or kill their quarry.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat and Stoney travel to Wyoming to oversee a land opening and end up playing nursemaid to a pair of identical twin pranksters and a kooky Chinese cook. Meanwhile, a trio of outlaws are pursuing the twins seeking information they possess. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate hires Herby to work as an assistant manager at the hotel, causing Uncle Joe to fear for his position. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe tries to advertise Shady Rest as a hotel for honeymooners.But is Hooterville really the best place for a honeymoon? Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 A Night at the Hooterville Hilton
programme.desc: Upon reading a fantastical brochure Uncle Joe made, a hotel critic comes to Shady Rest. Can Hooterville live up to Joe's hype? Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe (Charles Lane) threatens to close down the Cannonball on Christmas Eve, disrupting the Shady Rest hotel's holiday plans. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Directed by Guy Scarpita. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Annie and the Twisted Trails
programme.desc: Feeling envious about Annies freedom and trick riding skills, Della runs away from home to see her boyfriend when the rodeo comes to town. While on her own, she meets a couple that secretly wants to rob her father.Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. Also starring Carolyn Craig, Ewing Mitchell, and Myron Healey. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Tensions rise as a range war over water seems inevitable. A masked man dressed as Robin Hood tries to help the homesteaders by knocking down the ranchers fences. Things seem to be going well until a similarly dressed imposter robs the Diablo bank.Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was niominated for a Primetime Emmy Award in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.desc: A member of Teddy Roosevelts Roughriders returns to Diablo to take the valuable land he had been promised. When he arrives, he discovers that the land is part of an Indian reservation. Things quickly turn from bad to worse when a corrupt land agent frames the man for murdering a brave with the hope of inciting an Indian war, which he will use for his own desires for the valuable land. Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Diablo is in danger when a gang of hired killers comes to town. Lofty finds himself conflicted as he is reluctant to take on the gang once he discovers the leader rescued him back in their days in the U.S. Cavalry. With the state senator possibly the target of the gang, the townspeople call for Lofty to resign amid his reluctance. Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primtetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Dave Morgan, an honest lawyer, faces off with Carter Holmes, a crooked politician, in a fiery election campaign. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Looking through an old trunk, Tagg and his friend Johnny Ward, the son of a murdered lawman, find proof that his uncle is an ex-convict and may be involved in a recent bank robbery. Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley
programme.desc: The bank is robbed and the sheriff is killed while everyone is distracted by the wedding between Sand Creeks newspaper editor and a beautiful brunette. The sheriff being the editors best man, the grief-stricken editor begins to escalate the anger towards a suspected drifter with his bias reporting. Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley

Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Yellowneck
programme.desc: Location shooting in the Florida Everglades add to this dramatic tale of five Confederate deserters trying to get to Cuba. First, they must overcome snake bites, unfriendly Seminoles, and their own conflicts with each other. How many of the five will actually make it out alive? Lin McCarthy, Stephen Courtleigh, and Berry Kroeger star in this little known example of 1950s independent filmmaking.

programme.title: Custer's Last Stand
programme.desc: The survivor of an Indian attack acquires a rare medicine arrow, and a menacing character named Blade (Reed Howes) will stop at nothing to take it from him. Elmer Clifton (Assassin of Youth, Seven Doors to Death) directs a memorable cast that includes Rex Lease (The Sign of the Wolf, The Monster Walks), Lona Andre (Slaves in Bondage, Death in the Air), and William Farnum (Samson and Delilah). Meanwhile, Frank McGlynn Jr is in the title role of General George A. Custer.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: John Wayne stars as Ted Hayden, a tough hombre who goes undercover to join a gang led by a heartless fiend known only as Mr. Gentry (Lloyd Whitlock). Gentry is out to take over a ranch belonging to one of Hayden's friends, but as Hayden finds out, Gentry has a lot more than that up his sleeve. You'll have to watch this two-fisted Western to find out the rest!

programme.title: Randy Rides Alone
programme.desc: John Wayne was 27 when he starred in this vintage western drama from Hollywoods Poverty Row. He plays Randy Bowers, a man wrongly jailed for murders. With help from a female friend, he breaks out of prison and sets out to find the real killers. Harry L. Fraser (The Last of the Clintons, Rustlers Paradise) directs a strong cast of familiar faces, including legendary sidekick George Gabby Hayes, Earl Dwyer, and one of the hardest ridin stuntmen turned actors, Yakima Canutt.

programme.title: Daughter of the West
programme.desc: A FLAMING PAGE FROM AMERICAN HISTORY Becomes a powerful motion picture...set against the panoramic grandeur of the West!. Martha Vickers stars as Lolita Moreno, a convent raised woman in the 1880s who learns about her Native American heritage through her relationship with an educated Navajo. Morena had been raised at a California mission, but when she leaves to teach school in Arizona, the threads of her mysterious past are revealed. This leads to her involvement with some dangerous people, and a chance to find love in the most unexpected way. The cast includes Phillip Reed, Donald Woods, William Farnum and Milton Kibbee. Pedro de Cordobaa stars as Chief Wykomas.

programme.title: American Empire
programme.desc: This epic of America's westward march stars Leo Carrillo and Preston Foster in a tale of men building a cattle empire, only to battle rustlers, the weather, and each other! The romantic adventure from director William C. McGann (In Old California, Alcatraz Island) features a strong leading performance by Oscar nominated RKO star Richard Dix (Cimarron, The Ghost Ship) plus cinematography by six-time Oscar nominee Russell Harlan (To Kill a Mockingbird, Rio Bravo).

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, killing all but one. The surviving ranger is nursed back to health by Native American Tonto, and takes on the identity of a masked vigilante, determined to bring all outlaws to justice. Culled from episodes of the popular TV series, this feature is great fun for fans of the Lone Ranger. Starring Clayton Moore and Jay Silverheels.

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Rather than a gorgeous Hollywood starlet, actor Cameron Mitchell (Carousel), playing cowboy Ted Daniels, shares the screen in this film with a magnificent wild horse named Gallant Bess, who he tames, trains and keeps for himself. But after Ted is gravely injured in a fixed rodeo, Bess is stolen away from him and forced to join a cruel traveling carnival in this fast-paced western from director Lew Landers (The Adventures of Rin Tin Tin).

programme.title: The Two Gun Man
programme.desc: Ken Maynard stars in this vintage western about ranchers under threat from hired gunmen. Director Phil Rosen, whose career dated back to working with Thomas Edison and included several Charlie Chan features, keeps the action hot with help from a strong ensemble, including Charles King, Murdock MacQuarrie, and a horse named Tarzan! Maynard plays Blackie Weed, a marshall going undercover to capture and arrest some cattle rustlers.He finds himself up against some very bad men, and he's soon framed for murder. Watch as Blackie blazes his way to vindication with a .45 in either hand and the flame of righteous anger in his eyes... Kitty: Nita Martin. Joe Kearney: Lafe McKee. Lem Tolliver: Tom London. Ranch Foreman: Walter Perry

programme.title: Fugitive of the Plains
programme.desc: In this continuation of the much loved Billy the Kid serials featuring dreamboat Buster Crabbe (perhaps best known for his numerous appearances as Flash Gordon in the 30s and 40s), Billy finds himself joining an outlaw band led by women in order to, once again, clear his name after being wrongly accused of a crime he did not commit. Helmed by famed B-movie director Sam Newfield, this film also features Al St. John, whose lovable Fuzzy character was as essential to the PRC's Billy the Kid series as Billy himself.

programme.title: Revenge of the Virgins (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The angry and topless female members of a Native American prepare for battle when white treasure hunters move in on their sacred ground. Peter Perry Jr. (The Secret Sex Lives of Romeo and Juliet) directed this early nudie-cutie from a script by legendary cult filmmaker Ed Wood (Plan Nine from Outer Space). Writing under the pen name Peter LaRoche, Wood churned out this screenplay just before he reinvented himself as the author of seedy adult novels.

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west meet their match in this B-Western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Rex Bell, billed on the old print ads as The heroic idol of young America! stars as Breezy Kildare, a New York detective who happens to be in Wyoming. When Breezy leads a group of cattleman against the well-armed city boys, the bad guys will wish theyd stayed in New York! The rest of the cast includes such favorites from the period as George Gabby Hayes, Roy DArcy, and Marceline Day. (Day worked opposite everyone from John Wayne to Buster Keaton, but retired from acting shortly after this movie at age 25.) Directed by Harry L. Fraser.

programme.title: Neath Canadian Skies
programme.desc: It's the mounties versus claim jumpers in this drama from Golden Gate Pictures. Based on an action-packed novel by James Oliver Curwood and directed by B. Reeves Maynard (Undersea Kingdom, The Phantom Empire), the film features an outstanding cast of Poverty Row regulars, including Russell Hayden, Inez Cooper, Cliff Nazarro, I. Stanford Jolley, and Kermit Maynard. For movie buffs: Cinematographer Marcel Le Picard began his career in the silent era and finished with exactly 200 credits!

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat and Stoney are ordered to Wisconsin to investigate an Indian agent's claim that a lumber company is forcing the Chippewa Indians off their reservation in order to harvest pristine stands of pine trees. The G-Men's investigation is hindered by the distrust of the Chippewas as well as the lumbermen. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat Gallagher and his sidekick Stoney Crockett are Secret Service agents in the Old West, dispatched by the government to investigate crimes threatening the young nation. In this episode, Pat and Stoney are ordered to California to investigate reports of an anthrax epidemic and get involved in murder and a feud between neighboring ranchers. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat and Stoney are ordered to San Pablo, Mexico, to find out what's behind the trouble an American tungsten mine is having. When they arrive, they discover the mine has been closed, the wells are all poisoned and the town is in the grip of a malaria epidemic. To make matters worse, the lawmen have been followed by four gunslingers determined to give the American troubleshooters all the trouble they can handle - and more. Russell Hayden stars.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat Gallagher and his sidekick Stoney Crockett are Secret Service agents in the Old West, dispatched by the government to investigate crimes threatening the young nation. In this episode, Pat and Stoney tangle with a gang of robbers who have hijacked an Army payroll. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan. Originally aired on NBC.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When Herby (Don Washbrook) gets drafted, Kate tries to cheer him up by saying he could become an astronaut. Could hooterville actually send someone ito the space program? Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Bobbie Jo and the Beatnik
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo falls head over heals for an edgy young poet from New York. He likes her, too, but he's not fond of Hooterville. Of coure, Kate has to show Bobby Jo what this pompous fool is all about. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963. Look for Dennis Hopper as the beatnik.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 My Daughter the Doctor
programme.desc: The family wants Billie Jo to become a doctor, but she wants to go to Hollywood to become an actress. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Directed by Jean Yarbrough. And be sure to look for Adam West in a pre-Batman role as Doctor Clayton Harris. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in January, 1964.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Billie Jo recieves an endowment, but instead of using it for medical school, she wishes to go to Hollywood.Kate meets with Judge Drucker to see if she can legally prevent the girl from goinng. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Directed by Jean Yarbrough.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. In this episode, Doc resorts to drastic measures as he desperately seeks money to fund his free public clinic. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. In this episode, the judge learns of a scheme to smuggle guns and ammo to the Indians, and he encounters an unlikely pair of allies in his plan to break it up: an organ grinder and his monkey. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. In this episode, the Judge and Jeff take on the richest man in the valley over water rights. Though the rich villain has ensnared young Hugh in outlaw ways, the lawmen are determined to set Hugh on a better path. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. In this episode, Jeff Taggert's brother is accused of robbing the Del Rio bank. While investigating the case, Jeff is implicated in the hold up. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Sheriff Blade arrives from Comstock to arrest rancher Del Randall, but the Judge thinks the charges are trumped up. Bean and Taggart put Del in jail for safety while they investigate Blade's connection to suspiciously wealthy Mendenhall. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. When a young man seeking his birthright is accused of murder he makes a run for it. After a posse incurs several more deaths the Judge begins to realize things don't add up. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: In this episode, Sharon Bender intends to marry Adam over the objections of wealthy father Dan. When Dan's killing is announced, Adam is jailed and a lynch mob forms. The Judge and Taggart have their doubts wondering if a murder even occurred. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: While attempting to steal land from an Indian tribe, crooked ranchers kill one of the braves. The Judge must move fast to prevent an all-out massacre. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone (Bruce Bennett) battles Shawnee warriors as he leads a band of settlers into Kentucky in this frontier potboiler from Albert C. Gannaway Productions. Made at the height of Hollywood's fascination with pioneer days, the film also stars Lon Chaney Jr. as Chief Blackfish, and country singer Faron Young as a handsome young suitor for Boone's daughter. There's plenty of action and danger here as the Shawnee are convinced that Boone is trying to steal their land. But Boone is ready, not even fearing death by tomahawk. It isn't how you die, Boone says. It's what you live for.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An Apache brave seeks vengeance on a band of sadistic gold hunters in this bloody drive-in western. Pitcalin (Jody McRae) leads the marauders who wipe out an Apache camp when they discover gold, only to watch their violent deeds lead to their own demise. Featuring a superb cast that also includes Dan Kemp, Robert Tessier, and Joel McRae, this coldblooded western tale was directed by character actor and filmmaker Jack Starrett (Cleopatra Jones, The Losers).

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a novel by western writer Zane Grey. With a wild and wooly cast that includes Johnny Mack Brown, Marsha Hunt, Monte Blue, and Lucian Littlefield, director Charles Barton (Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein) gives us a tale of romance, action, and high stakes gambling!

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this Republic Pictures western about the final days of the Pony Express. Former rider John Blair (Wayne) enters a coach race to win a $25,000 government mail contract, but there are dozens of obstacles in his path. The rest of the cast includes Lane Chandler and Phyllis Fraser, plus Lew Kelly (Lady of Burlesque) doing a great comic turn as Rocky OBrien, the eccentric, self-proclaimed mayor of a deserted mining town.

programme.title: In Old Colorado
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy and his crew get involved in a war over water rights in this feature from Harry Sherman Productions and Paramount Pictures. The intrigue starts when crafty Joe Weller (Morris Ankrum) turns two ranchers against each other, which leads to dire results. This is the 33rd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy movies, with WIlliam Boyd in the role he made famous. Also, look for regular Hoppy co-stars Russell Hayden as Lucky Jenkins, and Andy Clyde as California Carson.

programme.title: Hoppy Serves a Writ
programme.desc: Sheriff Hopalong Cassidy triumphs again in this lighthearted western romp from Harry Sherman Productions. Good ol' Hoppy (William Boyd) has to leave his beloved Texas to track down some bad guys in Oklahoma. You can bet that the action and suspense will follow Hopalong wherever he goes. Also, look for a number of familiar faces in the ast, including TV's future Superman George Reeves, notorious Hollywood heavy Victor Jory, and in his first credited role, Robert Mitchum! In fact, Mitchum would appear in more of Hoppy's adventures before branching out on his own and becoming one of Hollywood's greatest stars. Also featuring Jan Christy, Forbes Murray, Byron Foulger, Earle Hodgins, and Roy Barcroft. Directed by Goerge Archainbaud.

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, and Doc Holliday ride again in Howard Hughes' epic 1943 western, but the character you'll remember most is sultry country vixen Rio McDonald. Hughes' nationwide search for an actress to play Rio resulted in the film debut of Jane Russell, whose natural assets were allegedly helped by a special bra designed by Hughes. When The Outlaw finally received a nationwide release in 1946, its success vindicated Hughes and made Russell a star. As for Hughes' infamous bra, Russell said in her 1988 memoir, I never wore it, and he never knew.

programme.desc: View a burnt cat’s recovery, a dog’s heartworm fix, and delicate eye surgery.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2019 : E09 Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
programme.desc: Sun Bowl Stadium in El Paso, TX is ground zero for Monster Jam action.

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E03 Fiserv Forum - Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson brings the Arena Championship Series East points lead to the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee. El Toro Loco’s Armando Castro looks to drive El Toro Loco to another Overall Event Championship while 2019 World Finals Champion Linsey Read tries to defeat them both.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2001 : E12 RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle
programme.desc: Indianapolis is the home of motor sports and tonight, the roof of the RCA Dome will be raised as Monster Jam trucks compete in freestyle action. Will one man stand alone as champion? Find out now!

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2006 : E18 Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Freestyle
programme.desc: It's chaos and triumph and everything epic- it's the freestyle action from Ford Field, on March 4, 2006.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2018 : E15 Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA
programme.desc: The competition is getting fierce as we near the end of the 2018 Monster Jam season.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2005 : E04 Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing
programme.desc: Monster Jam races into the Georgia Dome, on January 8, 2005.

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E20 Vibrant Arena - Moline, IL
programme.desc: In an epic series finale, Arena Championship Series West heads to the Vibrant Arena in Moline, Illinois as Krysten Anderson looks to lead Grave Digger to the Overall Event Championship in one last thrilling showdown with El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez.

programme.title: Championship Series

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 loanDepot Park - Miami, FL
programme.desc: The dirt is ready and the engines are roaring as Monster Jam takes over loanDepot park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 8. Witness the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series East as drivers battle across three intense stages: JCB Racing, the Skills Challenge, and Freestyle. Rivals like Adam Anderson and Tristan England look to defend their dominance, while fierce competitors like Jamie Sullivan and Chris Koehler push their 1,500-horsepower machines to the absolute edge to claim the BKT overall event championship. Don't miss a second of the gravity-defying stunts and heart-pounding action in this electric stadium environment.

Max D’s Tom Meents kicks-off his final competitive season.

programme.title: BP Ultimate Rally Raid Portugal 2026
programme.desc: The BP Ultimate Rally-Raid joined the W2RC calendar in 2024. The competition on Portuguese and Spanish tracks is always unforgettable for both cars and motorcycles. The event, organized by the Automóvel Club de Portugal, counts as the second round of the calendar. The rally offers a 1,200-kilometer route with wide and varied tracks: from the vast sandy beaches of the Alentejo coast to the busy roads of the Ribatejo region, not forgetting the rocky tracks of the Extremadura province in Spain. Diversity is the key word for the five days of racing! The bivouac is set up in the heart of the town of Grândola, in the province of Setúbal, 100 kilometers south of Lisbon.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki goes undercover in a fertility clinic whose unusual success rate is due to the actions of a Swartalfen.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Sarah searches for her missing roommate. Jay endures Pete’s revenge as Kappa Psi sisters prep for Gamma Fair.

programme.title: The Wrong Husband
programme.desc: Melanie discovers her husband is actually his twin, Alex, back to steal his life—and willing to kill for it.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: After 73 errors about firefighters in her last romance novel, Jo's publisher, Diana, insists on weeks of research for her next book by training at a military boot camp run by her navy seal brother.

programme.title: A Man for Every Month
programme.desc: Blogger, Megan, tends to shy away from dating, but that all changes when her boss assigns her to vlog her dates for the eligible bachelor calendar. Now pushed out of her comfort zone, Megan must quickly learn the golden rules of dating.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a TV show host and her colleague when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: Ivy & Mistletoe
programme.desc: A young woman is determined to get home for Christmas, but gets stranded in a small town during a snow storm. Little does she know that she is exactly where she is supposed to be.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, to take her to the senior prom, little did she know that 15 years later she’d be married, have two daughters and tons of debt. When Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker, Paula wishes her decision were different. With bills and troubles mounting, especially frustrating during the Christmas season, Paula wishes hard to trade places with Nick’s wife. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick. But, be careful what you wish for… Although she is financially rich, she is far from happy. Eventually her “dream” becomes a “nightmare,” as Nick wants a divorce and she can’t find a way back to Gary and her daughters. Will there...

programme.title: Love on Trend
programme.desc: A fashion blogger gets a new number and steps into a glamorous life, but falls for her predecessor’s ex.

programme.title: WWJD What Would Jesus Do?
programme.desc: A group of Americans - a singer, a newspaper editor, a pastor and a real estate mogul - vow to walk in the steps of Jesus. Every day, every decision becomes a turning point in their lives as they must ask themselves "What Would Jesus Do?"

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A woman goes on the run with her children to escape an abusive husband, who is the District Attorney. He puts out an Amber Alert for them.

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a talented chef and her childhood best friend as she regains her passion for cooking.

programme.title: Abduction of Angie
programme.desc: Paramedic Miranda races to save her daughter Angie, who was kidnapped by Miranda's estranged father.

programme.title: Alter
programme.desc: Alter, a psychological thriller about a man who is convinced that he’s found his childhood abductor, and is determined to get him to confess by any means necessary.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: At the Gamma Christmas Mixer, Sarah is missing and her friends' search leads to a shocking attack.

programme.title: The Past Never Dies
programme.desc: CASEY MARSH was born in captivity. Her mother, JANE, was abducted as a teenager and gave birth to Casey while she was being held by the kidnapper, TIMOTHY FAST. Jane eventually escaped when Casey was 6 years old. Timothy Fast was arrested and incarcerated. Ever since, Jane has struggled to regain a normal life for her and her daughter. For Casey, the memories of a childhood in captivity still haunt her. Jane, on the other hand, has seemingly moved on. She has re-married and is happy. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. Casey is furious that...

programme.desc: Jeri Jones runs the popular website ‘Bad Date Chronicles’ where daters can go to anonymously post horrible date experiences. Realizing he’s the subject of one of the posts, rival blogger Jack Collins dares Jeri to three dates in an attempt to prove he’s not such a bad guy after all.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: A prosecutor must work on a case which reminds her of her childhood, when her mother was killed by her alcoholic father.

programme.title: Running Away
programme.desc: Sisters Maggie and Lizzie move in with mom Peg's new husband. Secrets and lies start immediately. Maggie cannot handle what follows and recruits a friend to help her plan to get out of town with her step father's secrets. When Peg discovers that her daughter has run away, she now has to find Maggie fast but must come to terms with the dark secrets that led to Maggie's fleeing and the secrets about her new husband.

programme.title: Murder in the Vineyard
programme.desc: When a teenager is hazed at a party by anonymous bullies, her mother sets out to protect her.

programme.title: Blood Ties

programme.title: The Charm of Love

programme.desc: Un spot de plongée connu pour ses coraux, ses poissons-lions invasifs et son épave de navire fantôme.
